user.title: ShineMonitor account
user.description: Sign in with the username and password you use at shinemonitor.com.

plant.title: Choose a plant
plant.description: Your account has access to more than one plant. Pick the one to add.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate ShineMonitor
reauth_confirm.description: Your ShineMonitor session has expired. Please re-enter your password.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to reach ShineMonitor. Check your network and try again.
error.no_plants: Your account has no plants. Add one at shinemonitor.com first.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This plant is already added to Home Assistant.

init.title: ShineMonitor options
init.description: Change how often Home Assistant polls the ShineMonitor cloud. Polling faster than the datalogger's upload interval will not produce fresher data.
